entry.title: New: RES25-307 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT VALUED AT $14,858.63 TO THE CITY FROM THE HONOLULU ZOOLOGICAL SOCIETY FOR A CONCRETE COATING TO BE APPLIED TO THE ZEBRA BARN HOLDING AREA, WHICH INCLUDES THE BACK HALLWAY AND THE KEEPER WALKWAY.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
